name: Goat Heretic
description: Circle 6 (Heresy) — blasphemous priest goat. Dark magic caster, summons and curses.

textToImageTask.prompt: A bipedal humanoid goat demon priest in A-pose, tall gaunt build, pale gray fur, long spiraling horns with inverted cross symbols carved into them, wielding a corrupted iron censer on a chain swinging with dark purple smoke, wearing desecrated priestly vestments with torn and inverted religious iconography, a heavy iron chain necklace with a broken cross pendant, digitigrade goat legs under long robes, hollow pale violet eyes, stylized dark fantasy game character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Tall gaunt bipedal goat demon priest, pale gray, spiral horns with carved crosses, iron censer on chain, desecrated vestments, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Pale gray fur, tarnished iron censer with purple smoke wisps, torn dark vestment fabric, carved horn symbols, iron chain necklace with broken cross
